summary: Wired QA standards routing into Explorer, Logger, Debugger, and auto orchestration so UI, API, automation, and test-data standards are read on-demand.
derived_updates: Added a global QA standards routing map so the chain can choose the smallest relevant raw standards source by domain.
Updated Explorer, Logger, and Debugger to consult QA standards when expected behavior, severity, reproducibility, or test method is unclear.
Updated workspace rules and orchestration prompt so QA_STANDARDS is now part of the reusable local brain flow.
